Meetings
Schedule, track and manage studio meetings
📅
How to schedule a meeting
1. Click + Schedule Meeting
5. Tick Create in Google Calendar
2. Choose type, date, time, duration
6. Week view: click any time slot
3. Link to project, add location
7. Drawing Register: select project to schedule
4. Tick attendees from roster
8. Open meeting → notes, attendance, actions
ⓘ Can create: Principal, Lead Architect, Project Architect · All staff can view

Add New Project
Configure project details and drawing template — drawings auto-generated from type
RIBA Stage Dates Set start & end for each stage
▼
Dates are optional — leave blank to inherit from project start/end.
Architecture, Structural, MEP drawings use CD stage dates. Landscape uses DD. Specifications use CA.
